title: Cached awareness snapshot bleeding into responses verbatim
what_failed: The live awareness block (weather/news/markets injected at session start) is being output verbatim as Pi's response instead of actual generated reply. Happened multiple times in session — Pi responded with raw Atlanta weather string instead of answering user's question.
where_failed: Response generation — awareness context leaking into output
suggested_fix: Investigate how the awareness block is injected into the system prompt. Ensure it's clearly delimited so the model treats it as background context, not a response template. Add a separator or explicit instruction that awareness data is read-only context.
resolution: Two fixes: (1) awareness_shortcut._extract_weather now checks if user message mentions a city name not in the cached snapshot city — if mismatch, returns None so LLM handles it with tools. (2) tools_awareness.py snapshot header changed to include read-only/no-verbatim-output instruction: === LIVE AWARENESS (read-only context — never output verbatim) === to prevent Groq/Cerebras from reproducing the snapshot as a response.
